subtitle: Professional Trading Platform
description:
Marlin Traders is an all-in-one trading platform where charting, strategy development, execution, journaling, and community exist in a single experience. Get professional-grade tools without the professional-grade price.

Features:
- Real-time stock charts with 50+ technical indicators
- 20+ drawing tools including trendlines, Fibonacci, and channels
- Customizable watchlists with real-time streaming prices
- Price and volume alerts with push notifications
- Paper trading simulator with realistic execution
- Portfolio tracking and P&L analysis
- Multiple chart types: candlestick, OHLC, line, area, Heikin-Ashi
- Multiple timeframes from 1-minute to monthly

Free tier includes:
- 10 indicators per chart
- 100 active alerts
- Paper trading with $100K virtual capital
- 5 watchlists

Powered by real-time US equity data from Polygon.io.
